holdings.infoBox: GGME is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 18.20%, Apple at 8.01%, NVIDIA at 7.88%, QUALCOMM at 6.39%, and Meta Platforms at 6.25%.

overview.description: The Invesco Next Gen Media and Gaming ETF (GGME) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the STOXX World AC NexGen Media index. The fund tracks an index of securities that derive a majority of their revenue to the future media industry. These components may be from any market-cap, and from any geography. GGME was launched on Jun 23, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: STOXX World AC NexGen Media Index

data.title: 2 Sectors Where the Ultra-Wealthy Are Putting Their Money
data.text: Family offices poured more than $3 billion into tech, media, and telecom companies. But materials attracted the most capital—$4.8 billion.

data.title: Disney shares surge nearly 10%, and some ETFs go along for the ride
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with big holdings in Walt Disney Co. DIS, +9.91% jumped Wednesday, with some adding to gains that put them on track for their best week in over a month.
